name: M4A1消音版 | 平流层巡航
nameZh: M4A1消音版 | 平流层巡航
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been custom painted with spacefaring ships circling a planet in outer space. \"One day in the not too distant future...\"
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 它采用了宇宙飞船环行星涂装。 “在不远的未来某日……”
